description: Generate a publication-quality scientific schematic/diagram from a natural-language prompt, with AI quality-review iteration via OpenRouter (Nano Banana 2 generation + Gemini 3.1 Pro review).
rules: read-only with respect to local state; calls the OpenRouter API over the network
requires OPENROUTER_API_KEY; without it (or offline) the porter degrades and writes an empty placeholder output
output PNG (plus per-iteration versions and a review log) is written under record_store
max 2 refinement iterations; re-generation occurs only when quality is below the doc-type threshold
usage: Set PROMPT (diagram description), OUTPUT_NAME (e.g. schematic.png), DOC_TYPE (journal|conference|poster|presentation|report|grant|thesis|preprint|default), and OPENROUTER_API_KEY. Output: ${RECORD_STORE}/${OUTPUT_NAME}.
limitation: Needs OPENROUTER_API_KEY and network access to produce a real image; offline it only creates an empty placeholder. python3 must have the requests library for live generation.
